title: lepturidium insulare
intro: Lepturidium insulare, also known as the island bean trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is primarily found in the Mediterranean region and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its ability to soothe and calm irritated tissues. Herbal preparations of Lepturidium insulare can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
